title: schima wallichii subsp. noronhae
intro: Schima wallichii subsp. noronhae, also known as the Northern Schima, is a plant species that belongs to the family Theaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its leaves and stems being used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal formulations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules.
